message:
🌱 Replace explicit any types in demoData.ts and GPUInventoryHistory.tsx (#10929)

- demoData.ts: Replace `: any` return type on getDemoJaegerStatus with
  the existing JaegerStatus interface from types/jaeger.ts
- GPUInventoryHistory.tsx: Replace `t: any` with TranslateFn type alias
  matching the codebase pattern, and cast at call site

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
